_comment: 12.1 PTR build feed — one entry per PTR build's development notes. Canonical source: the official forum thread (each build = a new reply post; machine-readable via .json Discourse endpoint). Discovered via Wowhead news RSS. Newest first.

builds.label: Follow-up notes (forum post #13): PvP-only talent adjustments + item note (no PvE class tuning)
highlights: PvP only (out of scope for this tracker's PvE ratings) — Restoration Druid: Call of Ohn'ahra now increases Nature's Swiftness cooldown by 30s (was 10s). Evoker: Swoop Up PvP talent removed. Hunter: Hunting Pack radius 30yd (was 15yd); Chimaeral Sting no longer applies subsequent effects when dispelled; Roar of Sacrifice reduces PvP damage taken by 25% (was 15%). Mage: Improved Mass Invisibility CDR 3min (was 4min); Ring of Fire duration 4s (was 3s); Arcanosphere damage +25%; Overpowered Barrier absorption +60% (was +100%).
Items — Trinketaur now also offers Nebulous Voidcores for PTR testing.

builds.label: Follow-up notes (forum post #12): Unholy DK tuning bug fix + housing wipe/import
highlights: Unholy Death Knight — Dev note: "We're resolving a bug that affected Unholy Death Knight's tuning and making additional adjustments to our latest tuning pass as a result." The overall damage reduction from the 07-08 (build 68569) tuning pass is corrected from −8% to −3% (i.e. the original −8% blanket nerf was itself buggy and overshot).

Unholy Death Knight — Fixed Nazgrim's Conquest incorrectly granting additional Strength when Magus of the Dead is sacrificed for Lord of the Dead; Nazgrim's Conquest no longer grants Strength from critters/low-level targets.
Non-class: Housing wiped and re-importable from live (Character Copy → 'Copy Account Data'); Blueprints available for testing again.

builds.label: Weekly PTR build (Build 68569): post-Heroic-testing tuning — over-performers nerfed (Frost DK, Unholy DK, Havoc DH, Subtlety Rogue, Retribution Paladin) and under-performers buffed (Marksmanship Hunter, Fire Mage, Destruction Warlock, Devourer DH, Balance Druid, Arms Warrior); Blood DK tier set implemented, Scalecommander Wingleader CDR reworked, Discipline Void Shield power redistributed, Mythic raid + Season 2 dungeon testing opens
highlights: Frost Death Knight — All ability damage reduced by 10%; melee damage reduced by 20%; Obliterate −10%, Icy Death Torrent −35%, Remorseless Winter −30% (over-performance nerf after first Heroic raid testing).
Unholy Death Knight — All damage reduced by 8%; Lord of the Dead −25%, Magus of the Dead −15%, and several plague/ghoul abilities −15–25%.

Blood Death Knight — The previously announced Venomous Abyss tier set is now implemented: 2-set builds Blood Debt on Death Strike (Strength up to 5%, then a 10%-Strength Marrowrend at 10 stacks); 4-set grants +3 Bone Shield and Shadow AoE.
Marksmanship Hunter — Big damage buffs to close the gap: Multi-Shot +80%, Steady Shot +50%, Kill Shot +25%, Rapid Fire / Volley / Auto Shot +20%, Arcane Shot +15%.
Beast Mastery Hunter — Cobra Shot base damage +30% and Auto Shot +20%, but Serpentine Strikes, Cobra Senses, Hogstrider, and the 4-set single-target bonus were all reduced; Barbed Shot −12%.
Fire Mage — All ability damage increased by 12%; Pyroclasm duration increased to 20 seconds (was 15).
Destruction Warlock — All damage increased by 10%.
Devourer Demon Hunter — All ability damage increased by 10% (Havoc Demon Hunter −5%).
Balance Druid — All damage +3.5% with DoT/builder buffs (Moonfire / Sunfire / Wrath +10%, Starfire +20%) so its profile isn't purely spender-driven.
Retribution Paladin — All damage reduced by 6%; the Venomous Abyss 4-set reworked around Divine Arbiter (damage +35%).
Discipline Priest — Void Shield absorption −30% with the power redistributed across the kit (all healing/absorption +10%, Ultimate Penitence +30%, Atonement 32%).

Evoker — Scalecommander's Wingleader redesigned (per-target Deep Breath / Breath of Eons CDR replaces the old spread-Bombardment mechanic), with Command Squadron and Maneuverability buffed to compensate.
Arms Warrior — Single-target buffs into Slayer: melee auto-attack +100%, 2-set now boosts Mortal Strike and Execute, Slayer's Dominance proc chance 25% (was 15%).
Protection Warrior — 4-set Bloody Rebuke bleed +100% plus a Defensive Stance survivability bump; Colossus buffed to close the gap with Mountain Thane.

builds.label: Weekly PTR build: class tuning and tier set redesigns (Blood DK tier preview, Mage defensives, Holy Paladin buffs), PvP diminishing-returns reset 16s to 20s, Season 2 M+ dungeon testing announced
highlights: Feral Druid — Blood Spattered increases Ferocious Bite damage by 8% (was 2%), but maxes out at 6 stacks (was 10).
Arcane Mage — New Talent: Refractive Images – 10% of damage you would take is instead dealt over 8 seconds. Casting Mirror Image increases this effect to 30% for 15 seconds.
Holy Paladin — All damage increased by 20%.
Marksmanship Hunter — Explosive Shot damage increased by 15%.
Subtlety Rogue — Shadow Techniques’ base effect frequency has been increased by 40%.
Affliction Warlock — The Venomous Abyss 2-set bonus has been redesigned – Agony damage increased by 15%. Corruption damage increased by 25%.

builds.label: Housekeeping addendum: Discord integration now available for PTR testing (no class tuning)
highlights: Discord is now available for testing on the PTR. Details on how to connect Discord to your Battle.net can be found in our article.

builds.label: Weekly PTR build: class tuning wave (Frost/Unholy DK rebalance, Enhancement Shaman steady-state buffs), Earthen exploration XP nerf, Heroic raid/Lair/Altar of Fangs testing, Housing enabled
highlights: Frost Death Knight — Howling Blast damage increased by 100%. This does not apply to PvP combat.
Frost Death Knight — Obliterate damage reduced by 25%. This does not apply to PvP combat.
Unholy Death Knight — Blightburst now causes Putrefy to extend the duration of plagues by 3 seconds (was 4.5 seconds).
Havoc Demon Hunter — Blind Fury now causes Eye Beam to generate 10/20 Fury per second (was 15/30 Fury).
Enhancement Shaman — Doom Winds now increases the chance of Windfury Weapon activating by 50% (was 100%).
Arms Warrior — Ignore Pain absorb increased by 25%.

builds.label: Initial 12.1 Curse of Ula'tek PTR development notes: full patch notes covering all 13 classes, +25% player health/creature damage, DPS cooldown throughput reductions, new raid/dungeon/Lairs/Housing/Discord features
highlights: Devourer Demon Hunter — Mastery: Monster Within has been updated – Bonus damage during Void Metamorphosis reduced by 66%.
Demon Hunter (class-wide) — Demon Hunters can now equip daggers.
Blood Death Knight — Permafrost grants a shield equal to 50% of damage dealt (was 40%).
Restoration Druid — All spell and ability healing increased by 6%.

Warrior (class-wide) — The Rend ability is now exclusive to Arms, has returned to being a single-target ability, and its Rage cost is reduced to 10. Cleave will apply Rend to all targets if the Warrior knows Rend.
Destruction Warlock — Conflagration of Chaos has been redesigned – Conflagrate and Shadowburn have a 100% chance to critically strike, and their damage is increased by your critical strike chance.
